generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA emergency preparedness coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to have robust civil defense systems. While some argue these programs are expensive, the cost of being unprepared could be far greater. We've seen in recent years how natural disasters and potential security threats can disrupt our daily lives. Investing in preparedness isn't just about spending - it's about ensuring our communities are resilient. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
